curation_notes: Re-curation. The advisory references commit 5d03c17 on the stale_packages branch, but the actual removal from main is commit 37832fff3 ('Remove stale packages from main #17235'). The vulnerability is a SQL injection in the run_sql_query method of the SQLDatabaseToolSpec class in the finchat pack, which passes user-controlled query strings directly to connection.execute(text(query)) without sanitization. The patch is noisy (262 files removed across many stale packages). No sibling locations found — the finchat pack directory contains only BUILD, __init__.py, and base.py. Pre-assigned class sql-injection confirmed via CWE-89, advisory description, and code inspection.
